narrative:
Precinct Logan 2 (precinct in Hocking County) has 1,147 registered voters, with 66.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.7%, a modest Republican lean of 4.5 percentage points.
